title: Weekly Market Report — Week of Apr 17, 2025
summary: 41/67 themes advanced (+1.42% avg). Stabilization after tariff selloff. Semiconductor Equipment rebounded +7.3%.
report:
## Market Overview (Week of Apr 14–18, 2025)

Partial stabilization. 41 of 67 themes advanced, average return +1.42%. US-Japan trade negotiation progress reduced escalation fears; yen stabilized at 147–149.

---

## Rising Themes

### #1: Semiconductor Equipment (+7.3%)
Recovery trade as tariff fears moderated. Tokyo Electron and Advantest rebounded strongly.

### #2: Defense & Aerospace (+5.8%)
Defense budget expansion timeline reconfirmed.

### #3: Inbound Tourism (+4.1%)
April visitor statistics continued record pace. Hotel RevPAR confirmed premium pricing power.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

AI/semiconductor themes sell off on macro sentiment but recover faster than other sectors — confirming structural uptrend intact. Defense and Inbound Tourism showed counter-cyclical resilience.
